heading: Projects
subheading: Things I've built — side projects, experiments, and open source work.

projects.name: Portfolio
projects.description: My personal portfolio built with Next.js 16, Tailwind CSS v4, and next-themes. Fully data-driven — all content lives in JSON files.

projects.name: Promote
projects.description: A platform for creating and managing promotional campaigns. Built the complete frontend infrastructure from scratch including design system and API integration.

projects.name: Dev Tools CLI
projects.description: A command-line toolkit for automating repetitive dev workflows — scaffolding, code generation, and deployment helpers.

projects.name: Taskr
projects.description: Minimal task management app with real-time sync, drag-and-drop boards, and team collaboration features.
